---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an idea or improvement
title: "[Feature] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

**What problem are you trying to solve?**
Describe the problem or need. The problem matters more than a specific solution —
it helps to understand the "why" before the "how".

**Describe the solution you'd like**
What you imagine happening, if you have something in mind.

**Alternatives you've considered**
Any other approaches you thought about.

**Additional context**
Anything else — examples, links, mockups.
